raw: {"perspective": "CTO Watchdog", "position": "for", "argument": " Atlas should first verify the EIN receipt and confirm it matches the expected details, then immediately check the 83(b) election status to prevent duplicate filing and potential $150 loss as seen in Class 19. Next, update the atlas_obligations row to reflect the handled filings and notify the CEO. Lastly, initiate the process for obtaining an ITIN and setting up a Mercury bank account.", "strongest_counter": "Potential delay in obtaining ITIN and setting up bank account might hinder business operations", "evidence_cited": "Class 19, ECOSYSTEM-CONSTITUTION.md", "whistleblower_flag": "null"}
argument: Atlas should first verify the EIN receipt and confirm it matches the expected details, then immediately check the 83(b) election status to prevent duplicate filing and potential $150 loss as seen in Class 19. Next, update the atlas_obligations row to reflect the handled filings and notify the CEO. Lastly, initiate the process for obtaining an ITIN and setting up a Mercury bank account.
strongest_counter: Potential delay in obtaining ITIN and setting up bank account might hinder business operations
